search_document:
User Request: Customers by city.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customers by City
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of customers across different cities
Title: Customer Count by Region
Type: table
Description: Number of customers in each region
Title: Total Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of customers

sql_queries.title: Customers by City
sql_queries.description: Distribution of customers across different cities
sql_queries.sql: SELECT City, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY City ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Customer Count by Region
sql_queries.description: Number of customers in each region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Region ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Customers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) AS TotalCustomers FROM Customers
